restore_instructions.step1: Upload videos to Azure Blob Storage using: az storage blob upload --account-name pacifictubestorage --container-name videos --file [local_path] --name [blob_path]
restore_instructions.step2: Copy the 'video_metadata' entries back into video_metadata.json
restore_instructions.step3: Copy the chapter files from chapters_backup/ folder back to chapters/ folder
restore_instructions.step4: If needed, regenerate subtitles using: python generate_dual_subtitles.py [video_path] ja en
restore_instructions.step5: If needed, regenerate thumbnails using: python generate_thumbnails.py
